Chat.title: Chat Session
Chat.description: A conversation session between a user and the AI.

title.description: The title of the chat session.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this chat.

updatedAt.description: When the chat was last updated.

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat session.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

/chats/{chatId}/messages.description: Subcollection of messages for a specific chat.
